name: L1 — Magma Tyrant Burnstack
flavor: Hit it. Watch the embers travel up your arm.
description: Mono-FIRE / mono-INFERNO bunker centered on magma_tyrant. The L1 mutation lets the tyrant counter-burn anyone who lands damage on it (burn_stacks +1 per hit), and the supporting INFERNO chassis (ash_strider, blazefiend, lava_skink, brimling commons) all have APPLY_BURN_STACK triggers of their own — turning a single attack window into multiple stacks of post-turn fire damage. The non-burn pieces (coalbreaker, ember_raptor, magma_warden) supply the raw ATK to actually kill targets before their burns finish ticking off.
